caption: The video captures a scene from "Sim Week," specifically on Day 4, where medical students or trainees are engaged in a simulation exercise for a laparoscopic cholecystectomy (Lap Chole). The setting appears to be a clinical training room equipped with medical simulation tools and technology. Several individuals, all wearing masks and scrubs, are gathered around a table that likely contains a surgical simulator. One person is actively using the simulator, while others observe closely, possibly receiving guidance or feedback. In the background, another group of participants can be seen working on their own tasks, contributing to a busy and educational atmosphere. The environment emphasizes hands-on learning and collaboration among the participants.
